notes: The FIRST milestone of v2.7 'july jitter' — the HARD go/no-go re-sync barrier (the M237/M222 clean-stage lineage). Re-pointed the load-bearing seeder (skillpath.*->public.skill_path_sessions) to defuse the imminent break, bumped the demo clone pins to the CONSOLIDATED platform (skillpath decommissioned into app, 3 subgraphs), de-skillpathed the live bring-up path, and proved ONE cold /demo-up GREEN — 561 rows to public.skill_path_sessions. The CODE-of-record lives in the rosetta-extensions authoring copy (a SEPARATE git repo) at tag july-jitter-m246-harden; this close merges ONLY the rosetta doc-half (plan artifacts + the update_guide.md re-sync note) into release/02.70-july-jitter. Tooling + docs only, 0 platform-repo edits. Overview open-question #2 answered NO — no migration/subgraph break from the bump; downstream milestones safe to scope against this topology.
